The '''''Vulnerator''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] assigned to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleet]]. [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] commented that it had been in service as long as her parents. The ''Vulnerator'' and its two escorting [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]] participated in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
